Dr. Jane Doe

Singapore 123456

Dear Dr. Doe,

We are pleased to extend an offer of employment with FutureTech Innovations Pte. Ltd. (UEN: T12345678G) for the position of Senior Research Scientist. Your starting annual salary will be SGD 120,000, payable monthly. This offer is contingent upon the successful completion of all pre-employment checks.

Please report to our office located at 456 Enterprise Lane, Singapore 654321, on your start date. For any queries, feel free to contact us at +65 6123 4567 or hr@futuretech.sg.

This letter serves as a formal employment offer and will be referred to as the "Offer Letter." Acceptance of this Offer Letter constitutes your agreement to the terms outlined herein.

Kindly review the project plan attached to this Offer Letter. It is essential to note that the project status will not affect the terms in the Offer Letter.

Please confirm your acceptance by signing below and returning a copy to us by [Acceptance Deadline].

Sincerely,

Mr. John Smith  
Head of Human Resources  
FutureTech Innovations Pte. Ltd.  
https://futuretech.sg/user/S1234567A

NRIC: S2345678B (obfuscated as S 2 3 4 5 6 7 8 B)
